name: context-first-harness
description: Context-First Harness (CFHM) — a meta-skill that turns a domain description or planning document into a Context Engineering layer (canonical seam contracts) FIRST, then builds the agent team (HE) as owners of those seams, and finishes with governance (single-source-of-truth + contract-first change protocol), progress ledger, and update-enforcing hooks. Goes beyond harness-only plugins that stop at agents/skills. 도메인을 컨텍스트 정본(seam)→에이전트 팀→거버넌스·진행관리까지 표준화하는 메타 스킬.
